title: Arctic Taskforce
description: A modpack based on Re:Create but with additions to meet the needs for the Arctic Taskforce server.
body:
# Create: Arctic Taskforce Presents:
Create: Arctic Taskforce is a modpack used on the SMP Arctic Taskforce. A Minecraft modpack that centers around the create mod. Curated by PvP2Max, this fabric-based modpack is filled with content for you or you and a group of friends to explore. Wether you're looking to build intricate contraptions, explore automation, or simply add mechanical life to your world.

With Create, you can build anything from functional machinery to grand, moving structures like trains, windmills or even complex factories, all within the familiar Minecraft aestethic. Pair this with the countless addons available and you can create nearly anything.
